title: Senior Plant Manager at Himalaya Drug Company

jsonLd.title: Senior Plant Manager at Himalaya Drug Company
jsonLd.description:
Himalaya Drug Company has an exciting opening for a Plant Manager at our Chandigarh office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Himalaya Drug Company:
Himalaya Drug Company is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Six Sigma

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Himalaya Drug Company!
